data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Provides an additional layer of security for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Supports 2FA through mobile SMS and authenticator apps.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Encrypts user communications from end-to-end to safeguard data.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS v1.2 for data in transit and encryption algorithms like AES and RSA.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Uses machine learning to identify and mitigate potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Integrates AI algorithms for anomaly detection and behavioral analysis.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular audits to patch vulnerabilities and enhance security.
data.technical_spec: Implements automated scanning tools and manual penetration testing.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Invites hackers to report vulnerabilities in exchange for rewards.
data.technical_spec: Manages through platforms like HackerOne for community-driven security.
